Date: Tue, 13 May 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-05-13
Message-ID: <KQy0WJuXQPm9esUhN0iYxw@geopod-ismtpd-8>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="f322d0d72305f54789a61e7614c70f4b678f8498bd77e6d53e362d7ec931"

Hi there, Loyal Llama League! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share exciting updates, including a workshop on
building Deep Research agents, new features in LlamaParse, and
innovative multi-modal retrieval techniques. Dive into these
highlights and more to enhance your experience with LlamaIndex!

💰 FinTech event

We're hosting an exclusive workshop in New York city to bring
together the top thinkers, builders, and decision-makers shaping
the future of finance at Agents and RAG in Finance. You can be
part of it! Sign up here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1QY6ByOpXT8Mjfw17aJksWOSNUK1LWQgesa7-QEXcjU ).

🤩 The Highlights:

* Build Your Own Deep Research Agent: Learn how to create a
multi-agent system from scratch in LlamaIndex, covering
everything from single-agent workflows to advanced multi-agent
systems. Check out the notebook ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..UxTAsuEH9fEGjzJOo4pHA_2q0hXzQ6ZJXGYU4pj54tw )  or watch a video ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..v-Xl3hM4-bsbynLog5ipShWK-XDjYv3jtjxwuvS0FTs ) .
* Multi-Modal Retrieval Techniques: Discover how to use Voyage
AI's multi-modal embeddings and MongoDB's multi-modal indexes for
effective image and text data handling. Explore the full notebook
here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8zIEtdAXSm2N4-1ToniboMIhiYwmtX_UopZw1pzEQS0 ).

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* LlamaParse Enhancements: Experience the latest features in
LlamaParse, including new models, auto orientation detection,
confidence scores, and customizable error handling. Read more
about these improvements ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3wEx28OasxBFhQ8bb9fIIO1fHdjTew20ziZG_6b4Mxc ).
* LlamaExtract Features: Enhance your AI applications with
citation capabilities and improved reasoning for complex data
sources. Read more on our blog ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vU_Fz9EBtQzpU-DcG854gFnWdXEUie6_YMl2gC1wzlk ).

✨ Framework:

* Agent Workflow in TypeScript: Exciting updates on AgentWorkflow
now available in TypeScript for building powerful AI
systems. Learn more ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..MfNX9ObWQJlyb3paUXj5piWkVydmgRiEV1KbxFsxWnA ).

✍️ Community:

* AI Agent Development: Explore how our AI agent can accurately
extract information from complex documents. Learn more 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..hHhjvd4uH8fC76p1M5U2SdXjJpyAm65VZIgzBXhV8PM ).
* Case Study on LlamaParse: Discover how 11x reduced SDR ramp
time using LlamaParse. Read the full case study 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..MbVsygP9t26inK_XHXxGtgbM901IONOG7MMuTRAPr1k ).

Thank you for being a part of our community! Stay tuned for more
updates and insights from LlamaIndex.

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZDnqsMcifN1dyNVgVg03HRtOtoD2CAKOZsgyYsdMuuk )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..wFs5UI5CFTSKtyTRVHUlqZL6OaIKKuCWqpMJkmxBFvs )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..8VU2Su8RHfIMGUTY-eZ-B3MaPAEKdSTMTk0JTXmXsFA )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
